examples.code:
<Stack Gap="1" Class="rounded-lg border bg-card p-1">
    <Flex Align="center" Justify="between" Class="rounded-md px-3 py-2">
        <Stack Gap="0">
            <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Weight="medium">Appearance</Lumeo.Text>
            <Lumeo.Text Size="xs" Color="muted">Choose your color scheme and mode</Lumeo.Text>

    </Flex>
    <Separator />
    <Stack Class="px-3 py-3">
        <ThemeSwitcher />
    </Stack>
</Stack>

mdSummary:
# ThemeSwitcher

Color-scheme picker that writes to ThemeService.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Utility
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/theme-switcher

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| ThemeSwitcher | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| ThemeSwitcher | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- (none)

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- `ThemeService` ()
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<ThemeSwitcher />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-background`, `--color-border`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-primary`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/ThemeSwitcher/ThemeSwitcher.razor`
